title: Held-out AUROC versus three GenomeCF axes on the four core human tasks. High AUROC does not guarantee low reverse-complement instability, biologically sensible shuffle behavior or good calibration. Task labels are Pr = Promoters, EC = Enhancers (Cohn), EE = Enhancers (Ensembl), and OCR = Open chromatin.
notes: Direct plotted points plus publication summary subset.
